headline: United’s Kirby plays down merger with a small airline, touts deal with American
summary: Investing.com -- United Airlines Holdings Inc. CEO Scott Kirby suggested Tuesday that acquiring a smaller airline may not be worthwhile, citing the significant effort required for such a transaction.

raw.headline: United’s Kirby plays down merger with a small airline, touts deal with American
raw.summary: Investing.com -- United Airlines Holdings Inc. CEO Scott Kirby suggested Tuesday that acquiring a smaller airline may not be worthwhile, citing the significant effort required for such a transaction.

headline: Lyft Unveils First Airline Loyalty Integration With United Airlines
summary: Lyft partnered with United Airlines for the first instance of an airline loyalty program integrating directly with a rideshare platform.

raw.headline: Lyft Unveils First Airline Loyalty Integration With United Airlines

headline: Lyft and United Launch First-Ever Pay With Miles Option for U.S. Rideshare
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & CHICAGO, April 29, 2026--Today, Lyft (Nasdaq: LYFT) and United Airlines (Nasdaq: UAL) announced the ability to pay with miles, a first-of-its-kind feature that allows MileagePlus® members to redeem miles directly in the Lyft app for eligible rides.* The launch marks the first time an airline loyalty program and rideshare platform have offered direct mile-to-ride redemption in the U.S. — giving travelers the flexibility to use their miles to cover their Lyft ride and flight.

raw.headline: Lyft and United Launch First-Ever Pay With Miles Option for U.S. Rideshare
raw.summary: SAN FRANCISCO & CHICAGO, April 29, 2026--Today, Lyft (Nasdaq: LYFT) and United Airlines (Nasdaq: UAL) announced the ability to pay with miles, a first-of-its-kind feature that allows MileagePlus® members to redeem miles directly in the Lyft app for eligible rides.* The launch marks the first time an airline loyalty program and rideshare platform have offered direct mile-to-ride redemption in the U.S. — giving travelers the flexibility to use their miles to cover their Lyft ride and flight.

headline: Booking Holdings CEO on Q1 results, impact of Middle East conflict and travel demand outlook
summary: Booking Holdings CEO Glenn Fogel joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the company's quarterly earnings results, impact of the Middle East conflict on the business, state of travel demand, and more.

headline: Spirit's $500M rescue plan: Should the federal government bail out the airline?
summary: Sara Nelson, Association of Flight Attendants international president, and Joel Griffith, Advancing American Freedom senior fellow, join 'Squawk Box' to discuss the pros and cons of a potential $500M federal rescue of Spirit Airlines, impact on the airline industry at large, and more.
